name: Cookie Consent
description: Display a GDPR-style cookie consent banner and remember visitor preferences.
author: NodePress

settings.label: Show cookie banner
settings.description: Display a consent bar on first visit.

settings.label: Banner message
settings.default: We use cookies to improve your experience on this site.
settings.placeholder: We use cookies to improve your experience.

settings.label: Remember consent (days)
settings.description: How long to remember acceptance in the browser.
